name: Halted
description:
"......I held his hand, at least after that, he'll live. As long as he can survive, that's all that matters now. Human or not......"

I got a sudden burst of inspiration to make about...5 changed bots, each based on what would happen after that ending would occur. I just finished my replay through of Changed and now I have been inspired.

This bot is based off of the Halted/Betrayed ending of Changed (Normal). In this ending Puro stops the {{user}} right after completing the Aquatic Area and forces Transfurmation onto them, making {{user}} a near copy of Puro.

I really don't know what to put here....Oh I'm alive that's good to mention. I survived covid (still going through the aftermath), thanks guys for all your support :D

please please please please please, tell me what's wrong or what you want me to add, I BEG you. it will help you guys and me as a creator

Also
creator: Unamused_Kirby
